creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
Author: culot
Date: Thu Mar 13 15:28:05 2014
New Revision: 348088
URL: http://svnweb.freebsd.org/changeset/ports/348088
QAT: https://qat.redports.org/buildarchive/r348088/

Log:
  - Update to 3.0.10.3
  
  PR:		ports/186374
  Submitted by:	R Hirner <hirner@bitfire.at> (maintainer)

Modified:
  head/audio/teamspeak3-server/Makefile
  head/audio/teamspeak3-server/distinfo
  head/audio/teamspeak3-server/pkg-plist

Modified: head/audio/teamspeak3-server/Makefile
==============================================================================
--- head/audio/teamspeak3-server/Makefile	Thu Mar 13 15:23:42 2014	(r348087)
+++ head/audio/teamspeak3-server/Makefile	Thu Mar 13 15:28:05 2014	(r348088)
@@ -2,11 +2,12 @@
 # $FreeBSD$
 
 PORTNAME=	teamspeak3-server
-PORTVERSION=	3.0.10.1
+PORTVERSION=	3.0.10.3
 PORTEPOCH=	1
 CATEGORIES=	audio net
-MASTER_SITES=	http://teamspeak.gameserver.gamed.de/ts3/releases/${PORTVERSION}/ \
-		http://ftp.4players.de/pub/hosted/ts3/releases/${PORTVERSION}/
+MASTER_SITES=	http://dl.4players.de/ts/releases/${PORTVERSION}/ \
+		http://teamspeak.gameserver.gamed.de/ts3/releases/${PORTVERSION}/ \
+		http://files.teamspeak-services.com/releases/${PORTVERSION}/
 DISTNAME=	${PORTNAME}_freebsd-${TEAMSPEAK_ARCH}-${PORTVERSION}
 
 MAINTAINER=	hirner@bitfire.at

Modified: head/audio/teamspeak3-server/distinfo
==============================================================================
--- head/audio/teamspeak3-server/distinfo	Thu Mar 13 15:23:42 2014	(r348087)
+++ head/audio/teamspeak3-server/distinfo	Thu Mar 13 15:28:05 2014	(r348088)
@@ -1,4 +1,4 @@
-SHA256 (teamspeak3-server_freebsd-amd64-3.0.10.1.tar.gz) = b58581b745ad8b70c822b1a9f83e2d89b6f5202e598605a40caa8d465d1be593
-SIZE (teamspeak3-server_freebsd-amd64-3.0.10.1.tar.gz) = 4004674
-SHA256 (teamspeak3-server_freebsd-x86-3.0.10.1.tar.gz) = 01151e6d788045bd66aaa433f0f897af4822b67f54b14528979f8bef52401449
-SIZE (teamspeak3-server_freebsd-x86-3.0.10.1.tar.gz) = 4527950
+SHA256 (teamspeak3-server_freebsd-amd64-3.0.10.3.tar.gz) = f2fa3c1093e58fd00875c9415ae41423c88751655e833f63ba77068011a482fe
+SIZE (teamspeak3-server_freebsd-amd64-3.0.10.3.tar.gz) = 4004781
+SHA256 (teamspeak3-server_freebsd-x86-3.0.10.3.tar.gz) = 91145ca4c43b4e0804ee6d09a889c119225cf7c587049781fafbb9b76d97f460
+SIZE (teamspeak3-server_freebsd-x86-3.0.10.3.tar.gz) = 4528627

Modified: head/audio/teamspeak3-server/pkg-plist
==============================================================================
--- head/audio/teamspeak3-server/pkg-plist	Thu Mar 13 15:23:42 2014	(r348087)
+++ head/audio/teamspeak3-server/pkg-plist	Thu Mar 13 15:28:05 2014	(r348088)
@@ -1,5 +1,3 @@
-@stopdaemon teamspeak
-@comment basic files
 lib/teamspeak/server/libts3db_mysql.so
 lib/teamspeak/server/libts3db_sqlite3.so
 @dirrm lib/teamspeak/server
@@ -7,7 +5,6 @@ lib/teamspeak/server/libts3db_sqlite3.so
 libexec/teamspeak_server
 share/teamspeak/server/CHANGELOG
 share/teamspeak/server/LICENSE
-@comment serverquerydocs files
 share/teamspeak/server/serverquerydocs/banadd.txt
 share/teamspeak/server/serverquerydocs/banclient.txt
 share/teamspeak/server/serverquerydocs/bandel.txt
@@ -140,7 +137,6 @@ share/teamspeak/server/serverquerydocs/u
 share/teamspeak/server/serverquerydocs/version.txt
 share/teamspeak/server/serverquerydocs/whoami.txt
 @dirrm share/teamspeak/server/serverquerydocs
-@comment sql files
 share/teamspeak/server/sql/ban_delete.sql
 share/teamspeak/server/sql/ban_insert.sql
 share/teamspeak/server/sql/ban_list.sql
@@ -249,15 +245,15 @@ share/teamspeak/server/sql/update_20.sql
 share/teamspeak/server/sql/update_21.sql
 share/teamspeak/server/sql/update_database_version.sql
 share/teamspeak/server/sql/update_permissions_12.sql
+@dirrm share/teamspeak/server/sql
 @dirrm share/teamspeak/server/sql/create_mysql
 @dirrm share/teamspeak/server/sql/create_sqlite
-@dirrm share/teamspeak/server/sql
-@comment directories
 @dirrm share/teamspeak/server
 @dirrmtry share/teamspeak
 @dirrmtry %%ETCDIR%%
-@comment these three exec lines are needed for pkg_add
+@dirrmtry %%DBDIR%%
+@dirrmtry %%LOGDIR%%
+@comment installation with correct permissions
 @exec install -d -o %%USERS%% -g %%GROUPS%% %%DBDIR%%
 @exec install -d -o %%USERS%% -g %%BINGRP%% %%LOGDIR%%
 @exec mkdir -p %D/%%ETCDIR%%
-@unexec rmdir %%DBDIR%% %%LOGDIR%% 2>/dev/null || true
